commandsRun: pnpm --filter @cdp/web test:e2e campaign-builder campaign-node-editors campaign-publish-gate broadcast-and-campaign
result.e2eSummary: Playwright SOLO (cdp_e2e, :8788/:5174), ONE invocation at a time. New specs 9/9 pass (campaign-list-detail 6, campaign-lifecycle 2, campaign-journey-smoke 1). Existing campaign + broadcast specs 33/33 pass (campaign-builder, campaign-node-editors, campaign-publish-gate, broadcast-and-campaign — updated openCampaigns helpers + back-to-list nav for the split). Segment + login-workspace-switch specs 14/14 pass (no regression from the kit toneFor + seed enrollment additions).
result.notes: Phase 7 complete, test-first. A) List/detail split: CampaignBuilder.tsx now exports CampaignsList (#/campaigns, list-only — Design email button REMOVED) + CampaignDetail (#/campaigns/new|/:id, the canvas builder moved verbatim, with a campaigns-back button); AppShell screenFor routes accordingly; editorReturn flow lands on the detail page naturally (URL carries the id). B) Lifecycle: pure nextLifecycle + campaignCountsShape + isEnrollableCampaignStatus added to campaign-runner core.ts (exported via index.ts); POST /campaigns/:id/{pause,resume,archive} (manage_content, scopedQuery, 404 cross-ws, typed 409); GET /campaigns returns status + per-campaign counts via one workspace-scoped GROUP BY; runner pause gate reads campaigns.status inside the locked tick (both tx + legacy CAS paths) so a paused campaign's due enrollment is parked, not advanced (FOR UPDATE/CAS/idempotency preserved). toneFor handles paused(warn)/archived(neutral). C) Full journey acceptance test composes live-event-enroll (createApp POST /profiles/:id/events) + manual + segment enroll, injected-clock advance through wait/hour-window/if/set_attribute/send/webhook/exit, real Dispatcher send (SES mocked) -> messages_log(campaign_id), injected webhook (allowlist/SSRF/secret-decrypt), idempotent re-tick, WS_B untouched. NO migration (campaigns.status already free-text). Version 0.36.0; CLAUDE.md updated. NOT pushed. Lint shows only the pre-existing known-7 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors (no new errors introduced).
result.testSummary: Full Vitest GREEN: turbo `pnpm test` 43/43 tasks pass. campaign-runner 172/172 (incl. new paused-campaign-not-advanced + updated in-memory orchestrator mock to carry campaigns.status); local-api 214/214 (incl. new campaign-lifecycle 5/5, campaign-enrollment-counts 2/2, campaign-journey-live-enroll 2/2). No regression across segments/web/db/email/etc.
